mapper.sql: SELECT poi_id, org_code, poi_name, longitude, latitude, province, city, district, address, poi_type, del_flag, create_time, update_time FROM jw_poi_info
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jw_poi_info WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0')
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM jw_poi_info WHERE (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') ORDER BY city
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_poi_info ( org_code, poi_name, longitude, latitude, province, city, district, address, poi_type, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{poiName}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{poiType}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_poi_info ( org_code, poi_name, longitude, latitude, province, city, district, address, poi_type, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{poiName}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{poiType}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE poi_name = VALUES(poi_name), longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), province = VALUES(province), city = VALUES(city), district = VALUES(district), address = VALUES(address), poi_type = VALUES(poi_type), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_poi_info WHERE poi_id IN
#{poiId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_poi_info ( org_code, poi_name, longitude, latitude, province, city, district, address, poi_type, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.orgCode}, #{item.poiName}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.district}, #{item.address}, #{item.poiType}, #{item.delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT poi_type FROM jw_poi_info WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') AND poi_type IS NOT NULL AND poi_type != '' ORDER BY poi_type
